name: at-dispatch-v2
tagline: Converts PyTorch AT_DISPATCH macros to the AT_DISPATCH_V2 format in ATen C++ kernel code.
verdict: Solid, narrow C++ refactoring skill with clear steps, worked examples, and a verification checklist. No security concerns found. Missing NOT-for scope guidance and any versioning signal; failure handling for unrecognized macro patterns is thin.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere despite covering many AT_DISPATCH_* variants, leaving room for misfire on adjacent macro work.
Only covers 'include already present' check; no guidance for macros that don't match a known pattern or edits that fail to apply.
Type group reference table and multiple pattern/edge-case catalogs are kept inline in SKILL.md rather than split into references/.
